text: If life gives you lemonade... don't eat the lemons!
author: Anonymous

text: There is no quote. This is all up to your imagination.
author: Anonymous

text: If there is no struggle, there is no progress.
author: - Frederick Douglass

text: Keep on trying... you don't get successful overnight!
author: - Anonymous

text: Out of difficulties grow miracles.
author: - Jean de La Bruyère

text: Mistakes are the portals of discovery.
author: - James Joyce

text: You have power over your mind - not outside events. Realize this, and you will find strength.
author: - Marcus Aurelius

text: We suffer more often in imagination than in reality.
author: - Seneca

text: Nothing in life is to be feared, it is only to be understood. Now is the time to understand more, so that we may fear less.
author: - Marie Curie

text: The unexamined life is not worth living.
author: - Socrates

text: I think, therefore I am.
author: - René Descartes

text: That which does not kill us makes us stronger.
author: - Friedrich Nietzsche

text: In a gentle way, you can shake the world.
author: - Mahatma Gandhi

text: To be, or not to be, that is the question.
author: - William Shakespeare

text: All that glitters is not gold.
author: - William Shakespeare

text: Knowledge is power.
author: - Sir Francis Bacon

text: It is never too late to be what you might have been.
author: - George Eliot

text: Do what you can, with what you have, where you are.
author: - Theodore Roosevelt

text: The mind is everything. What you think you become.
author: - Buddha

text: Whatever you are, be a good one.
author: - Abraham Lincoln

text: I have not failed. I've just found 10,000 ways that won't work.
author: - Thomas A. Edison

text: Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication.
author: - Leonardo da Vinci

text: I am not afraid of storms, for I am learning how to sail my ship.
author: - Louisa May Alcott

text: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
author: - Oscar Wilde

text: Always forgive your enemies; nothing annoys them so much.
author: - Oscar Wilde

text: If you tell the truth, you don't have to remember anything.
author: - Mark Twain

text: Good friends, good books, and a sleepy conscience: this is the ideal life.
author: - Mark Twain

text: To live is the rarest thing in the world. Most people exist, that is all.
author: - Oscar Wilde

text: Without music, life would be a mistake.
author: - Friedrich Nietzsche

text: You can't depend on your eyes when your imagination is out of focus.
author: - Mark Twain

text: Life is a succession of lessons which must be lived to be understood.
author: - Helen Keller

text: In the end, it's not the years in your life that count. It's the life in your years.
author: - Abraham Lincoln

text: Life is either a daring adventure or nothing at all.
author: - Helen Keller

text: Many of life's failures are people who did not realize how close they were to success when they gave up.
author: - Thomas A. Edison

text: I attribute my success to this: I never gave or took any excuse.
author: - Florence Nightingale

text: The mind is its own place, and in itself can make a heaven of hell, a hell of heaven.
author: - John Milton

text: To know what people really think, pay regard to what they do, rather than what they say.
author: - René Descartes

text: A room without books is like a body without a soul.
author: - Marcus Tullius Cicero

text: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
author: - Mark Twain

text: The unexamined life is not worth living.
author: - Socrates

text: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
author: - Lao Tzu

text: No one has ever become poor by giving.
author: - Anne Frank

text: Everything has beauty, but not everyone sees it.
author: - Confucius

text: Life is really simple, but we insist on making it complicated.
author: - Confucius

text: Do not go where the path may lead, go instead where there is no path and leave a trail.
author: - Ralph Waldo Emerson
